prompt: Create a detailed, highly engaging infographic-style travel guide for [country] The output should feel like a premium designer travel poster mixed with a fun comic illustration. Include: - A catchy title and short subtitle - What to see (specific places, not generic) - What to eat (local dishes, real names, not “street food”) - What to do (mix of tourist + local + unique experiences) - Local vibe (culture, behavior, atmosphere) - Quick practical tips (transport, budget, mistakes to avoid)
